# smtpfast Provider

The SMTPfast provider manages resources on [SMTPfast](https://smtpfa.st), a transactional email API: sending domains, API keys, and webhooks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    smtpfast = {
      source = "smtpfast/smtpfast"
    }
  }
}

# The API key can also be supplied via the SMTPFAST_API_KEY environment variable.
provider "smtpfast" {
  api_key = var.smtpfast_api_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) SMTPfast API key. Can also be set with the `SMTPFAST_API_KEY` environment variable. Create one in the [SMTPfast dashboard](https://smtpfa.st).
- `base_url` (String) Base URL of the SMTPfast API. Defaults to `https://smtpfa.st/api`. Can also be set with the `SMTPFAST_API_URL` environment variable.
